title: Forged Energy
description: Make more complex machines using this simple technology mod
body:
Forged Energy is a simple and lightweight MCreator technology mod, with JEI support

-Features-

**Solar Panel**

The easiest way to make energy. very helpful for energy generation if it is day

**Mechanical Fan**

A simple machine that pushes mobs and items away, but with the range of 3.5 blocks.

**Energy Battery**

Useful block to store some amount of energy. Only get input energy from the top, with the other sides being outputs.

**Obsidian Combiner**

A functional block made with crying obsidian, obsidian and amethyst that is used to make **Liquid Slime** (a liquid that is basically just green water), Mechanical Casing, and more.

**Mechanical Casing**

Used to make everything machine-related in the mod.
